about.heroHeadline: No Middleman, A Fair Price, From the Heart of Egypt's Land
about.heroSubheadline: Waraqat Shajar is a digital platform connecting Egyptian farmers directly with traders, factories, and consumers — no brokers, no hidden commissions.
about.missionBody: For decades, Egyptian farmers received the lowest possible price for their harvest, while consumers paid many times more — with the difference absorbed by a long chain of middlemen who had no real connection to the crop. Waraqat Shajar was built to close that gap: one simple platform where a farmer can list their harvest for the whole world to see, and any trader, factory, or even end consumer can reach them directly and agree on a fair price with complete transparency — without anyone taking a cut of work they never did.
about.howSubtitle: Four simple steps, from signing up to receiving your harvest
about.step1Body: Choose your account type — farmer, trader, factory, or consumer — and sign up in minutes.
about.step2Body: Farmers list their harvest with their own price and quantity; everyone else browses the available categories.
about.step3Body: Direct in-app conversation, with a formal offer system that makes agreeing on price and quantity easy.
about.step4Body: Once you reach an agreement, complete the deal directly between yourselves, with full trust and transparency.
about.why1Body: Direct contact with the farmer or trader — no broker, no hidden commissions.
about.why2Body: A formal in-chat offer system protects both sides.
about.why3Body: Two-way ratings after every deal build genuine trust between users.
about.why4Body: Our support team is available around the clock for any question or issue.
about.ctaSubtitle: Join thousands of farmers and traders buying and selling at a fair price every day.

terms.title: Terms & Conditions and Usage Policy
terms.intro: These terms govern your use of the "Waraqat Shajar" platform. By creating an account, you agree to be bound by them.

sections.heading: 1. Nature of the Platform
sections.body: Waraqat Shajar is a digital platform that connects farmers with traders, factories, and consumers to facilitate communication and negotiation for buying and selling agricultural products. The platform does not buy or sell any product itself, and is not a party to any deal made between users.

sections.heading: 2. Payment and Delivery
sections.body: All payment and delivery arrangements happen directly between the buyer and seller, entirely off-platform. Waraqat Shajar does not collect funds or arrange shipping, and is not responsible for any financial dispute, delay, or damage arising from these arrangements.

sections.heading: 3. Data Accuracy and Responsibility
sections.body: The platform currently does not verify identity, farm ownership, or business registration. Each user is fully responsible for the accuracy of the information they provide, including self-declared product quality ratings, crop descriptions, and quantities.

sections.heading: 4. Phone Number Privacy
sections.body: Your phone number is never shown to other users on the platform. It is used only for delivery, technical support, and contacting you as needed by site administration. All negotiation and communication between users happens exclusively through the in-platform chat system.

sections.heading: 5. User Conduct
sections.body: Using the platform to post misleading, abusive, or fraudulent content is prohibited. The platform administration may remove any listing or content that violates these terms without prior notice.

sections.heading: 6. Ratings and Reports
sections.body: After each interaction, both parties may rate each other. Any user may also file a report against another user (e.g. quality mismatch, non-payment, abusive behavior). The platform administration manually reviews every report and decides on the appropriate action, which may include a temporary or permanent account suspension.

sections.heading: 7. Limitation of Liability
sections.body: The platform is provided "as is" without any warranties. Waraqat Shajar is not responsible for product quality, pricing accuracy, or the outcome of any negotiation or deal between users.

sections.heading: 8. Changes to These Terms
sections.body: These terms may be updated from time to time. Continued use of the platform after any change constitutes acceptance of the updated terms.

sections.heading: 9. Phone Number Sharing Is Prohibited
sections.body: Writing or sharing any phone number in chats, comments, or any other text field on the platform is strictly prohibited. The system automatically detects, blocks, and logs any attempt to share a phone number. Three attempts by the same user automatically suspends their account for 24 hours, and administration may take further action, up to permanently stopping the conversation or the account, if the violation continues.

sections.heading: 10. Contact
sections.body: For any questions about these terms, please reach out via the "Contact Us" page.
